case_title: CALIFORNIA TECHNICAL CONTRACTING, INC. VS O'BRIEN INDUSTRIAL EQUIPMENT CO. INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN INDUSTRIAL EQUIPMENT CO. INC.
